steps.title: Factor the quadratic
steps.content:
If $px+q$ is a factor, write the expression as:
$$
ax^2+142x+c=(px+q)(rx+s)
$$
Expanding gives:
$$
(px+q)(rx+s)=prx^2+(ps+qr)x+qs
$$
So $a=pr$, $c=qs$, and $ps+qr=142$.

steps.title: Maximize the product
steps.content: Because $ac=(pr)(qs)=(ps)(qr)$, maximize the product of two positive numbers with fixed sum $142$. The product is greatest when the two factors are equal: $$ ps=qr=71 $$ Therefore: $$ ac=(71)(71)=5041 $$ The answer is 5041.
